# zstack_account (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage accounts in ZStack. An account represents a user identity with credentials for accessing ZStack resources.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the account.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for the account. This is a write-only sensitive field.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the account.

### Read-Only

- `type` (String) The type of the account (Normal, SystemAdmin).
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier (UUID) of the account.
